John Shelton, 1st Lord of Shelton, was born about 1140 in Shelton, Norfolk, England.  He was Lord Mayor in Stradbrooke, Suffolk, En …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Shelton於1430年出生時，他的父親John Shelton, Esq.27歲，母親Margaret Brewse18歲。他於1450年與Lady Margaret de Clere在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年7月16日享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Shelton于1430年出生时，他的父亲John Shelton, Esq.27岁，母亲Margaret Brewse18岁。他于1450年与Lady Margaret de Clere在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年7月16日享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登。

nameMeanings.name: Shelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Shelton was born in 1430, his father, John Shelton, Esq., was 27 and his mother, Margaret Brewse, was 18. He married Lady Margaret de Clere in 1450, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 16 July 1497, at the age of 67, and was buried in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Shelton est né en 1430, son père, John Shelton, Esq., avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Brewse, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret de Clere en 1450, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1497, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Shelton 1430 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shelton, Esq. 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Brewse 18. Er hat 1450 in England Lady Margaret de Clere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Juli 1497 im Alter von 67 Jahren und wurde in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Shelton è nato il nel 1430, il suo padre, John Shelton, Esq., aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Brewse, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret de Clere nel 1450, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 luglio 1497, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Sheltonが1430年に生まれた時，父John Shelton, Esq.は27歳，母Margaret Brewseは18歳であった。1450年にイギリスでLady Margaret de Clereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年7月16日に67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Shelton(이)가 1430년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shelton, Esq.(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Brewse(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1450년 영국에서 Lady Margaret de Clere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 7월 16일 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Shelton nasceu em 1430, seu pai, John Shelton, Esq., tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Brewse, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret de Clere em 1450, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1497, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Shelton родился в 1430 г., его отцу по имени John Shelton, Esq. было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Brewse, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret de Clere в 1450 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 16 июля 1497 г. в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Shelton nació en 1430, su papá, John Shelton, Esq., tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Brewse, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret de Clere en 1450, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de julio de 1497, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
